name: @forgeax/engine-fbx
description: FBX importer via Autodesk FBX SDK 2020.3.7 native addon. Converts .fbx files to 7 sub-asset POD types consumed by the engine asset pipeline.

bundle-size.reason: build-time importer with native addon; bundle size not meaningful for C++ native modules

fps.reason: build-time one-shot import; no runtime fps measured by this package

bench.reason: import wall-time baseline tracked in M0 spike-m0.md; no per-package bench suite needed

spike-report.reason: M0 spike report lives in .forgeax-harness/forgeax-loop/feat-20260615-fbx-importer-via-sdk/spike-m0.md (loop-state SSOT); not a per-package metric
